description: This richly decorated gaming box is one of the most extravagant works produced by the Du Paquier Porcelain Manufactory during its 25-year existence. Perhaps presented as a diplomatic gift, the box is painted in a complex, tightly organized pattern with colored enamels and gilding. It holds four small, similarly decorated containers that hold porcelain gambling chips mounted with gold and set with diamonds.
title: Gaming Set, Probably Made for the Russian Court
